member.name: T:TransferTransaction
member.summary:
A transaction that transfers hbars and tokens between Hedera accounts. You can enter multiple transfers in a single transaction. The net value of hbars between the sending accounts and receiving accounts must equal zero.

See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:TransferTransaction.#ctor(DictionaryLinked{TransactionId,DictionaryLinked{AccountId,Proto.Transaction}})
member.param: Compound list of transaction id's list of (AccountId, Transaction) records
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TransferTransaction.AddHbarTransfer(AccountId,Hbar)
member.summary: Add a non approved hbar transfer.

member.name: M:TransferTransaction.AddHbarTransfer(EvmAddress,Hbar)
member.summary: Add a non approved hbar transfer to an EVM address.

member.name: M:TransferTransaction.AddTokenTransferWithHook(TokenId,AccountId,System.Int64,FungibleHookCall)
member.summary: Add an token transfer with allowance hook.

member.name: M:TransferTransaction.AddNftTransferWithHook(NftId,AccountId,AccountId,NftHookCall,NftHookCall)
member.summary: Add an NFT transfer with optional sender/receiver allowance hooks.

member.name: M:TransferTransaction.AddHbarTransferWithHook(AccountId,Hbar,FungibleHookCall)
member.summary: Add an HBAR transfer with a fungible hook.
member.param: the fungible hook call to execute
